debug_info.goal:
H : Type u_1
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup H
inst✝¹ : InnerProductSpace ℂ H
inst✝ : CompleteSpace H
a : H →L[ℂ] H
ha : IsSelfAdjoint a
x y : H
f : C(↑(spectrum ℂ a), ℂ)
⊢ ‖ComplexMeasure.integral (@cfc_toComplexMeasure H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha x y) ⇑f‖ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ‖f‖

proof:
-- Let Φ be the linear functional used in the definition of cfc_toComplexMeasure
  set Φ : C₀(spectrum ℂ a, ℂ) →L[ℂ] ℂ := compSL C₀((spectrum ℂ a), ℂ)
    C((spectrum ℂ a), ℂ) ℂ _ _ (cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y)
    (@ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE
    (spectrum ℂ a) ℂ ℂ _ _ _ _ _ _).symm.toContinuousLinearMap
  -- Lift f to C₀
  set g : C₀(spectrum ℂ a, ℂ) :=
    (@ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE
    (spectrum ℂ a) ℂ ℂ _ _ _ _ _ _) f
  -- By integral_rieszMeasure: Φ g = μ.integral (⇑g)
  have h1 := ComplexRMK.integral_rieszMeasure Φ g
  -- cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y = rieszMeasure Φ
  change ‖(ComplexRMK.rieszMeasure Φ).integral (⇑f)‖ ≤ _
  -- (⇑g : spectrum ℂ a → ℂ) = ⇑f (definitional)
  have h2 : (⇑g : spectrum ℂ a → ℂ) = ⇑f := rfl
  -- Φ g = cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y f
  have h3 : Φ g = cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y f := by
    simp only [Φ, g, compSL_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.comp_apply]
    congr 1
  calc ‖(ComplexRMK.rieszMeasure Φ).integral (⇑f)‖
      = ‖(ComplexRMK.rieszMeasure Φ).integral (⇑g)‖ := by rw [h2]
    _ = ‖Φ g‖ := by rw [h1]
    _ = ‖cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y f‖ := by rw [h3]
    _ ≤ ‖cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y‖ * ‖f‖ := ContinuousLinearMap.le_opNorm _ _
    _ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ‖f‖ := by
        gcongr
        exact cfc_toLinearFunctional_bound ha x y
successful_attempts:

    (@ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE

  -- Lift f to C₀
